properties.displayName: File and Directory Discovery Commands dir s where r Get-ChildItem -Recurse
properties.description: Detect enumeration of files/folders using recursive or wide-scope discovery commands that adversaries use to locate data of interest.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " dir " or CommandLine|contains has " dir /s" or CommandLine|contains has " dir /b") and (Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\where.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "where /r ") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "gci -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Path")
